purpose: Map concepts from the original PDF-derived curriculum to the improved kid-focused curriculum and identify gaps before replacing chapter data.
summary_note: The new kid curriculum now covers all tracked source concept groups, adds dedicated tense spiral drills, and explicitly introduces Kannada respectful-vs-casual speech levels. Native-speaker review is still needed before Kannada script/romanization generation.
